ddls:
CREATE TABLE "collection_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection route */,
  "route_code" TEXT /* Code identifying the collection route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection route */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the municipality serviced */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., Residential, Commercial) */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the collection route */,
  "service_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of waste collection services for the route */,
  "route_map" TEXT /* Geographical map or coordinates of the collection route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_receptacles" (
  "receptacle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receptacle */,
  "receptacle_type" TEXT /* Type of receptacle (e.g., Recycling, Trash) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location of the receptacle */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection route servicing this receptacle */,
  "installed_date" TEXT /* Date the receptacle was installed */,
  "receptacle_capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the receptacle */,
  "receptacle_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the receptacle (e.g., good, damaged, missing) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance or cleaning of the receptacle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receptacle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_receptacles_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES collection_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_participation" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of participation registration */,
  "composting_participation" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the household participates in composting */,
  "recycling_participation" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the household participates in recycling */,
  "participation_programs" TEXT /* Specific programs the household participates in */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Status of household participation (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "education_and_outreach" TEXT /* Education and outreach efforts for the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_management_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role within the waste management department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the official's office */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the municipality */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Brief description of the official's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each collection route
Brief description of the collection route
Frequency of waste collection services for the route
Geographical map or coordinates of the collection route
Description of the location of the receptacle
Reference to the collection route servicing this receptacle
Condition of the receptacle (e.g., good, damaged, missing)
Date of the last maintenance or cleaning of the receptacle
Flag indicating if the household participates in composting
Flag indicating if the household participates in recycling
Specific programs the household participates in
Status of household participation (e.g., active, inactive, pending)
Education and outreach efforts for the household
Role within the waste management department
Brief description of the official's responsibilities
